name: Pork Tenderloin Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place thinly sliced potatoes in a well-greased 2-quart casserole.
2. Add 1 cup milk, sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Combine the remaining 1/4 cup milk with bread crumbs, seasonings, butter, and onions.
4. Spread over top of potatoes.
5. Cut pork tenderloin into half-inch slices and pound flat.
6. Place on top of bread dressing.
7. Dot with butter.
8. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1 1/2 hours.
9. Serves 4.
